title: neonauclea angustifolia
intro: Neonauclea angustifolia, also known as the Philippine mountain laurel, is a medicinal plant species native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiproliferative effects. The health benefits of Neonauclea angustifolia include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune system function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
